overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt riding his horse Roach through a rural countryside at night. The journey passes traditional thatched cottages, wooden bridges, wildflower meadows, dense forests, and agricultural fields before approaching a lit building with an NPC.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural village path with traditional thatched cottage

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding Roach at a steady canter along the dirt path beside a stone wall and thatched cottage

entered.detail: traditional wooden cottage with thatched roof and blue trim
low stone wall running alongside the path
small wooden footbridge crossing a stream
dense dark forest in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment begins beside a traditional thatched cottage with a stone wall running parallel to the muddy path. Geralt rides Roach forward through the rural village setting, approaching a small wooden bridge over a stream, with dark forest visible in the distance.

events.description: crossing wooden bridge into open meadow
entering forested area from open meadow

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride through the meadow passing a small wooden shed

entered.detail: open field with purple and yellow wildflowers
small wooden shed with sloped roof

segments.scene_description: After crossing the wooden bridge, the scene opens into a wide meadow filled with wildflowers. The camera passes a small wooden shed on the left while riding toward the tree line, transitioning from the open field back into forested terrain.

events.description: wooden fence appears along the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: riding through the dense forest path with trees on both sides

entered.detail: rustic wooden post fence lining the path

segments.scene_description: The path enters a densely wooded area where trees form a canopy overhead. A wooden fence runs along the right side of the trail as the horse continues through the dark forest, with the vegetation becoming thicker and more enclosed.

events.description: stone wall appears on left side alongside crop field

agents.ego_description: riding past cultivated fields with crops on the right and forest on the left

entered.detail: agricultural field with tall cultivated crops

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dense forest, the landscape opens into agricultural farmland. Cultivated crop fields stretch out on the right while a stone wall runs along the left side of the path, replacing the wooden fence as the terrain becomes more managed and open.

events.description: entering sunflower field on the left side of path
NPC villager becomes visible near the lit building ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching a rural building with warm light where an NPC stands near the entrance

notable_agents.action: standing near the building entrance holding a light source

entered.detail: field of tall sunflowers with bright yellow blooms
wooden rural building with warm interior light glowing from within

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a vibrant sunflower field on the left as the path approaches a lit rural building. An NPC stands near the entrance holding a light source, creating a focal point in the darkness. The agricultural landscape continues on the right while the stone wall recedes behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a rural nighttime landscape that transforms from a quaint village into a dense forest before opening into managed farmland. It begins beside a traditional thatched cottage and a stone wall, moving forward along a muddy path toward a small wooden bridge. As the camera crosses the bridge, the scene opens into a wide meadow of wildflowers and passes a small wooden shed before the terrain shifts back into a densely wooded area with a thick overhead canopy. The path then emerges from the dark forest into open agricultural land, where a wooden fence is replaced by a stone wall and cultivated crop fields stretch across the horizon. Finally, the landscape transitions into a vibrant sunflower field as the camera approaches a lit rural building where an NPC stands waiting in the darkness.
